page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7t.8xlarge is a general-purpose instance built on the x86_64 architecture. It features 32 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz, with 1.0 thread per core. The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps.

Benchmark results place this instance consistently in the average tier for general compute and memory tasks. It achieves a Geekbench single-core score of 1605.0 and a multi-core score of 13733.0. The Intel Xeon processor supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 (Foundation and VNNI) and cryptographic acceleration (AES, VAES, SHA_NI), which assist in workloads like software compilation (Geekbench compiling score of 26715.0) and ray tracing (33930.0). Memory performance is characterized by a read-only large block bandwidth of 153.13 GB/sec and a write large block bandwidth of 68.53 GB/sec.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation and balanced resource density, the ecs.g7t.8xlarge is qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads requiring predictable CPU performance without the overhead of hyperthreading. It is well-suited for database operations, web serving, and moderate machine learning tasks, as demonstrated by its Redis SET performance of 31.19 million operations per second and a strong text generation speed of 305.55 tokens per second on a small 135M LLM model.
description: The Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7t.8xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 32 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it provides 128.0 GB of RAM (4.0 GB per core) and a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps, with no local storage or GPU accelerators. Performance benchmarks indicate solid mid-range capabilities, with a Geekbench multi-core score of 13733.0 and a Passmark CPU score of 36670.06. The processor supports AVX-512 and cryptographic extensions, enhancing its efficiency for vector calculations and secure operations. This instance is optimized for workloads requiring dedicated compute resources and balanced memory allocation, such as database hosting, static web serving, and software compilation.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7t.8xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 128 GB RAM, and 16 Gbps network bandwidth, optimized for balanced compute and memory workloads.

tagline: A dedicated 32-core Intel Xeon instance with balanced memory and advanced vector extensions for predictable general-purpose compute workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated physical Intel Xeon cores with 1.0 thread per core for predictable performance
128 GB of RAM providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio
Baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps with no local storage or GPU
Suitable for database operations, software compilation, and web serving
